enterprise-ai-accelerator._comment_transport: RECOMMENDED: streamable-http (MCP spec 2025-03-26). Start server with: python mcp_server.py --transport streamable-http

stdio_local._comment: stdio (default) — Claude Code / Claude Desktop local. No server process needed; the client spawns it.

streamable_http_with_auth._comment: Streamable HTTP with bearer auth (MCP07). Set EAA_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN in the server environment.

sse_legacy._comment: SSE transport — LEGACY, superseded by streamable-http (MCP spec 2025-03-26). Start server with: python mcp_server.py --transport sse
